description: An FDA auditor is on-site conducting a routine inspection of the Phase II Diabetes Trial at your clinical site. To verify source data against the EDC, the auditor has requested the official Annotated CRF for the 'Demographics' form, as well as the complete exported Subject Casebooks for patients DM-101 and DM-102. Login to OpenClinica with username 'root' and password 'Admin123!' for the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study. Export the 'Demographics' Annotated CRF and the Subject Casebooks for DM-101 and DM-102 as PDF files to ~/Documents/Audit_Materials/. Exactly three valid PDFs must be saved to this location.
